ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the RL model used in the experiment */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Number of iterations performed in the experiment */,
  "average_discounted_return" REAL /* Average discounted return of the experiment */,
  "total_average_return" REAL /* Total average return of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the experiment */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* README file for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Q-learning, policy gradient) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the model */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that the metric belongs to */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return of the experiment */,
  "transf_bits" INTEGER /* Number of bits transferred during the experiment */,
  "num_trajs" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories used in the experiment */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return of the experiment */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of the return */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the policy */,
  "average_policy_std" REAL /* Average standard deviation of the policy */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity of the policy */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance of the return */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return of the experiment */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the version */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the version */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that the performance belongs to */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the performance entry */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Performance metric value (e.g., return, entropy) */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that the performance belongs to */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the performance entry */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Performance metric value (e.g., return, entropy) */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_performance_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
